name: Open-Faced Egg & Cheese Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon of fat in a large frying pan.
2. Add the onion and green pepper; cook until tender.
3. Mix together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the onion and green pepper.
5. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally so that the uncooked portion flows beneath the cooked portion.
6. Continue cooking until the eggs are set but still moist. Divide into 6 portions.
7. Spread each English muffin half with 1 tablespoon of butter or margarine.
8. Top each muffin half with an egg mixture and a slice of cheese.
9. Broil until the cheese is melted and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
NOTE: For this recipe, use only clean eggs with no cracks in shells.
[Because of the risk of salmonella poisoning, it's widely recommended that children, the elderly, and immunocompromised persons avoid consuming any raw or undercooked eggs.]
